signals: low-key, valid, it’s giving, brief meme-literate style
awesome, sounds good, just checking in, light self-aware humour
formal greetings, complete sentences, please/thank you
school apps, gaming/platform terms, youth sports, short messages
avoid: adult voice stuffed with kid slang

signals: concise email, dry aside, music/TV references if prompted
local terms, church/civic/school ties, fuller politeness formulas
notes: represent vocabulary and pacing, not caricature
